meta.name: Mullusi
meta.description: Public deployment and roadmap registry for Mullusi Symbolic Intelligence.

productRegistry.name: Mullu Govern
productRegistry.dataType: policy records, evaluations, traces, proof stamps, and audit events
productRegistry.releaseGate: runtime witness endpoints and public proof boundary
productRegistry.failureMode: fail closed, record violation, return repair action
productRegistry.summary: Flagship governed evaluation product for checking actions, recording traces, and issuing proof-backed verdicts.

productRegistry.name: Mullu Search
productRegistry.runtimeType: search service and future app route
productRegistry.dataType: web index, document index, symbolic index, query logs, and result traces
productRegistry.releaseGate: public route, privacy boundary, index policy, and result quality witness
productRegistry.failureMode: return no result with trace instead of unsafe ranking
productRegistry.summary: Search product family for governed retrieval over public, private, and symbolic indexes.

productRegistry.name: Mullu Agents
productRegistry.dataType: runs, tool calls, constraints, job state, and audit trace
productRegistry.releaseGate: permission model, tool policy, rollback path, and execution witness
productRegistry.failureMode: halt unsafe action, snapshot trace, and request operator repair
productRegistry.summary: Governed agentic service where every tool action must pass the control plane before execution.

productRegistry.name: Mullu Chain
productRegistry.dataType: blocks, transactions, proofs, governance records, and node logs
productRegistry.releaseGate: protocol spec, testnet boundary, economic policy, and rollback record
productRegistry.failureMode: reject invalid transition and preserve rejected delta
productRegistry.summary: Planned blockchain service for governed state transitions and proof-carrying records.

productRegistry.name: VIRECAI Video
productRegistry.runtimeType: video processing service and future studio app
productRegistry.dataType: videos, frames, annotations, artifacts, traces, and storage references
productRegistry.releaseGate: media policy, artifact storage boundary, and signed processing witness
productRegistry.failureMode: quarantine artifact, preserve trace, and return AwaitingEvidence
productRegistry.summary: Symbolic video and media platform work held private until storage, rights, and witness rules close.

productRegistry.name: Mullu Studio Music
productRegistry.runtimeType: creative product app and audio service
productRegistry.dataType: composition structures, audio artifacts, project records, and export logs
productRegistry.releaseGate: rights boundary, export policy, and reproducible audio witness
productRegistry.failureMode: block export until rights and trace requirements are satisfied
productRegistry.summary: Creative product family for rhythm, harmony, composition logic, and audio structure.

productRegistry.name: Mullusi Science Lab
productRegistry.dataType: math proofs, physics regimes, chemistry graphs, biology jobs, and simulation artifacts
productRegistry.releaseGate: method limits, safety policy, reproducibility evidence, and public specification
productRegistry.failureMode: mark AwaitingEvidence and preserve inputs, limits, and trace
productRegistry.summary: Cross-domain research layer for math, physics, chemistry, biology, and protein-folding workflows.

productRegistry.name: Health Research Pipeline
productRegistry.dataType: classified research inputs, derived artifacts, access records, and audit trace
productRegistry.releaseGate: restricted-data policy, human review, legal review, and evidence export boundary
productRegistry.failureMode: safe halt and require governance escalation
productRegistry.summary: Restricted research tooling that stays private unless safety, privacy, and authority requirements close.

productRegistry.name: Robotics Tools
productRegistry.dataType: robot tasks, constraints, telemetry, simulation records, and safety traces
productRegistry.releaseGate: physical safety floor, simulator witness, operator approval, and rollback plan
productRegistry.failureMode: fallback to safety floor and block physical action
productRegistry.summary: Engineering tooling for governed robotics simulation, runtime checks, and operator-controlled actions.

productRegistry.name: Developer Tools
productRegistry.sourceBoundary: private source registry with selected public releases later
productRegistry.runtimeType: SDK, CLI, validators, and local test harnesses
productRegistry.dataType: project settings, local validation reports, examples, and release evidence
productRegistry.releaseGate: install path, examples, license, changelog, and support boundary
productRegistry.apiPath: client access to governed API routes
productRegistry.failureMode: exit nonzero with explicit violation and repair hint
productRegistry.summary: Developer-facing packages and command-line tools for connecting projects to Mullusi services.

systems.name: Mullusi Website
systems.summary: Public index page, domain boundary, and website registry for Mullusi. Source remains private unless Mullusi publishes a separate release artifact.

am.summary: Public Mullusi website, domain boundary, and private-source deployment.

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Physics Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned symbolic causal physics engine for regimes, axioms, bridges, open problems, and solver execution plans.

am.title: ፊዚክስ
am.summary: ለregimes፣ axioms፣ bridges፣ ክፍት ችግሮችና solver execution plans የታቀደ ምልክታዊ ምክንያታዊ የፊዚክስ ሞተር።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Math Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned symbolic mathematics engine for proofs, algebraic structures, category-theoretic maps, optimization, and theorem workflow.

am.title: ሒሳብ
am.summary: ለማረጋገጫዎች፣ ለአልጀብራ መዋቅሮች፣ ለcategory-theoretic ካርታዎች፣ ለoptimization እና ለtheorem workflow የታቀደ ምልክታዊ የሒሳብ ሞተር።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Biology Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned causal biological structure engine for DNA/protein lineage, phenotype constraints, systems biology, and experiment planning.

am.title: ባዮሎጂ
am.summary: ለDNA/protein ሐረግ፣ ለphenotype ገደቦች፣ ለsystems biology እና ለexperiment planning የታቀደ ምክንያታዊ የባዮሎጂ መዋቅር ሞተር።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Chemistry Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned symbolic chemistry layer for reaction graphs, molecular constraints, regime bridges, and lab-safe hypothesis generation.

am.title: ኬሚስትሪ
am.summary: ለreaction graphs፣ ለmolecular constraints፣ ለregime bridges እና ለlab-safe hypothesis generation የታቀደ ምልክታዊ የኬሚስትሪ ሽፋን።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Music Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned symbolic music reasoning engine for rhythm, harmony, scale systems, cultural motifs, composition logic, and audio structure.

am.title: ሙዚቃ
am.summary: ለrhythm፣ harmony፣ scale systems፣ cultural motifs፣ composition logic እና audio structure የታቀደ ምልክታዊ የሙዚቃ ምክንያት ሞተር።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Engineering Engine
futureDomains.summary: Planned symbolic engineering engine for design constraints, systems modeling, tolerance and safety analysis, simulation bridges, and verifiable build specifications across many engineering products.

am.title: ኢንጂነሪንግ
am.summary: ለdesign constraints፣ systems modeling፣ tolerance እና safety analysis፣ simulation bridges እና በብዙ የኢንጂነሪንግ ምርቶች ላይ ሊረጋገጡ የሚችሉ build specifications የታቀደ ምልክታዊ የኢንጂነሪንግ ሞተር።

futureDomains.name: Mullusi Unified Science Lab
futureDomains.summary: Planned cross-domain bridge layer connecting math, physics, biology, chemistry, and music through governed causal structures.

am.title: የተዋሃደ ሳይንስ
am.summary: math, physics, biology, chemistry እና music በሚተዳደሩ ምክንያታዊ መዋቅሮች የሚያገናኝ የታቀደ ተሻጋሪ-ጎራ ሽፋን።

privateIncubation.name: Foundation and core kernels
privateIncubation.summary: Symbolic foundation, execution kernels, semantics, causality, proof principles, and Mfidel grounding stay private until they have stable public contracts.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after README, license, examples, test evidence, release scope, and product-readiness boundary are complete.

privateIncubation.name: Governance runtime and control plane
privateIncubation.summary: Operational routing, approvals, traces, budgets, deployments, and dashboard state remain private until contracts are stable.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after documented API contracts, test evidence, deployment boundary, and secret scan pass.

privateIncubation.name: SDK and developer package work
privateIncubation.summary: Client packages stay private until install, auth, examples, versioning, and support boundaries are ready.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after reproducible install, examples, license, changelog, and hosted-service dependency statement.

privateIncubation.name: Science and research engines
privateIncubation.summary: Physics, biology, chemistry, music, fold, and traversal engines stay private while claims remain exploratory.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only as frozen research snapshots, demos, or papers with explicit limits and no product-readiness claim.

privateIncubation.name: Inspection, search, capsule, and interface surfaces
privateIncubation.summary: User-facing tools stay private until they have coherent workflows, public-safe copy, and clear support boundaries.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after demo route, README, privacy boundary, and rollback path are present.

privateIncubation.name: Language kernels and machine-layer experiments
privateIncubation.summary: Compiler, token, machine-language, and causal-chain experiments stay private until the semantics are bounded and documented.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after spec, examples, failure modes, and compatibility commitments are written.

privateIncubation.name: Token, fold, traversal, and reasoning experiments
privateIncubation.summary: Deep symbolic experiments stay private while the research boundary, data limits, and demonstration path are not yet release-safe.
privateIncubation.publishGate: Public only after frozen snapshot, reproducible examples, documented limits, and explicit non-product status are present.
